extracted_equations.text: P(\text{outcome}) = |\langle \phi | \psi \rangle|^2
\chi = \iiint (G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C) \, dx \, dy \, dt
\frac{dC}{dt} = -S \cdot C
S \cdot C \;\text{ paid by infinite } G
s = +1 \;\text{(human life lived at full surrender)}
6.35\sigma \;\text{across}\; 2.5 \times 10^6 \text{ trials}
|\cdot|^2
S \cdot C
\frac{dC}{dt} = -S \cdot C \quad \text{(pure entropy, no coupling to } G\text{)}
\alpha(s)
$P(\text{outcome}) = |\langle \phi | \psi \rangle|^2

|ψ⟩ = possibility (Father). |φ⟩ = structure / measurement basis (Son). |·| 2 = actualization operator (Spirit). Plain English: Every quantum measurement requires three operations — possibility, structure, and actualization. The article argues this triadic structure maps onto the Trinity, and that the Spirit's actualization is what is not bound by the arrow of time. Theophysics Master Equation

χ = Logos Field. G = Grace. S = Sin/Entropy. C = Coherence. (Plus Mass, Energy, Time, Knowledge, Relationship, Quantum, Faith.) Plain English: The framework's central expression. Cited as “Framework Reference” in the article's axiom box. Bottom-of-Pit Coherence Dynamics (Tangent 08-C)

C = coherence with the Logos source. S = entropy/sin. The G-coupling is effectively zero (no surrender, no openness). Plain English: Pure entropy with no incoming grace — the equation that describes addiction at the bottom. Coherence decays exponentially because the channel through which grace would act is closed. Surrender Coupling Function

s = surrender parameter, ranging from −1 (active rebellion) through 0 (neutral) to +1 (full surrender). α(s) = the coupling between operator state and divine grace input. Plain English: CBT operates on willpower (O) without changing s, so α stays near zero. AA's Twelve Steps move s from −1 toward +1, opening α and letting grace flow. The framework's mechanistic explanation for why faith-based recovery clinically outperforms cognitive alternatives. Penal Substitution — Equation Term

S·C = accumulated entropy debt across humanity. Infinite G = Christ's infinite grace capacity, capable of absorbing the term without being destroyed. Plain English: The Atonement, expressed as the equation term. The penal-substitution view becomes a coherence-conservation statement: the S·C debt is paid, not by abolishing it, but by a being whose G is unbounded absorbing it. Recapitulation — Perfect Coherence Template

s = +1 = the surrender parameter at its maximum: full alignment, no rebellion. Plain English: Christ as recapitulation: where Adam ran the trajectory at low s and broke, Christ ran the same trajectory at s = +1 and held coherence through death. The s = +1 template demonstrated as physically possible for a human. Eternal-Frame vs. Temporal-Frame Cross

E erase = thermodynamic cost of erasing one bit of information. k B = Boltzmann constant. T = temperature. Plain English: Information erasure has a thermodynamic floor. The article uses this to ground the claim that every sin is a coherence-degrading event with real thermodynamic cost — the cost the Cross pays from within the temporal frame. PEAR-LAB Empirical Anchor (referenced)
chi_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C

The Born Rule requires three irreducible operations: $|\psi\rangle$ (possibility), $|\phi\rangle$ (structure), and $|\cdot|^2$ (actualization). These map to Father, Son, and Spirit. Now look at what each Person's relationship to time actually is:
Framework Reference: Theophysics Master Equation χ = ∭(G·M·E·S·T·K·R·Q·F·C) dx dy dt
Penal Substitution Debt absorption $S \cdot C$ term paid by infinite $G$
Recapitulation Life re-lived correctly Perfect $s = +1$ template demonstrated
$\frac{dC}{dt} = -S \cdot C \quad \text{(pure entropy, no coupling to } G\text{)}$
$$P(\text{outcome}) = |\langle \phi | \psi \rangle|^2$$
$$\chi = \iiint (G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C) \, dx \, dy \, dt$$
χ = Logos Field. G = Grace. S = Sin/Entropy. C = Coherence. (Plus Mass, Energy, Time, Knowledge, Relationship, Quantum, Faith.)
$$\frac{dC}{dt} = -S \cdot C$$
$$S \cdot C \;\text{ paid by infinite } G$$
$$s = +1 \;\text{(human life lived at full surrender)}$$
Logos Field ($\chi$)

The interaction architecture between the Logos field and embedded subsystems — the channel structure that determines how the field acts on a measurement. Field = pervasive substrate; coupling = how interactions occur within it. (Defined in detail in Article 01.)
